title: Adobe Express India — Tagline Positioning Test
description: A variant-comparison survey testing five candidate marketing taglines for Adobe Express in India. Each respondent rates resonance on a 1-5 scale and explains their gut reaction in their own words for each tagline (per-variant), then makes a single forced choice for the tagline that most makes them want to try the app — with reasoning (cross-variant). Three lightweight profiling questions establish cohort, tool stack and content type so the synthesis can break results by audience segment.
rationale: Mirrors the ADRS January 2026 study methodology: per-variant 1-5 resonance + verbatim sentiment, followed by a single cross-variant forced-choice with open-ended reasoning. The three general profiling questions allow the synthesis to attribute findings to the four cohorts (Massy Consumer / Small Business / Student / Creator). Five taglines × two per-variant questions = 10 per-variant interactions, plus 2 cross-variant questions and 3 general profiling questions = 15 interactions per respondent — closely matching the original ~13-question instrument while staying inside PRISM's 20-question schema cap.

questions.text: Which of the following best describes how you use creative design tools?
options: Massy Consumer / Personal — I make designs for myself, my family or my social posts (salaried employee, homemaker, non-employed)
Small Business / Solopreneur — I freelance, run a small business or do gig work where design is part of how I earn
Student — I am a full-time student; some occasional side freelance work is possible
Creator / Influencer — I create content (photography, video, writing, graphics) as a primary identity or source of income

questions.text: Which design and content tools do you use regularly? Select all that apply.
What types of content do you create most often? Select all that apply.
On a scale of 1 to 5, how much does this tagline resonate with your personal creative needs?
What is your honest first reaction to this tagline? What does it make you think or feel, and why?
questions.placeholder: Share what comes to mind in your own words — what it promises, what it overpromises, who it sounds like it is for, anything it reminds you of, what would make you ignore it or want to try the app.

questions.text: Of the five taglines you saw, which ONE makes you most interested in trying the app?
options: Magic of design. In your hands.
Ek click mein design (Design with a single click)
Ab India karega design (Now India will design)

questions.text: Why did you pick that tagline over the other four? What does it promise that the others did not?
questions.placeholder: Compare your pick to the others. What stood out? What were the others missing or doing wrong?

items.text: Magic of design. In your hands.
Ek click mein design (Design with a single click)
Ab India karega design (Now India will design)
